ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Type of class (e.g., lecture, lab, discussion) */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the class */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the class is held */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the class */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "class_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the class */,
  "class_status" TEXT /* Status of the class (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the class */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the class */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the class in minutes */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Number of the room where the class is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule entry */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., present, absent, late) */,
  "attendance_note" TEXT /* Note about the attendance (e.g., reason for absence) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the student is enrolled */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the student is enrolled */,
  "student_major" TEXT /* Student's major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the instructor is employed */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the instructor is employed */,
  "instructor_title" TEXT /* Instructor's title (e.g., Professor, Lecturer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the campus */,
  "campus_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the campus */,
  "campus_email" TEXT /* Email address of the campus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus where the department is located */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being tracked (e.g., attendance rate, student engagement) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the system being integrated */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., attendance, assignment) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "assignment_description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  "submission_file" TEXT /* File submitted by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
